title: The Farewell Speech
description: On pages 14, 15, 16, 17, this part focuses on the crew leaves alabasta behind. The Straw Hats move toward departure while Marines, allies, and the kingdom deal with the consequences of the battle.
scene: This scene belongs to the The Crew Leaves Alabasta Behind sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Luffy, Nami, Usopp, Narrator, Sanji.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Well would you look at that...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Something we can never take back...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: To find it unbearably regretful is natural...

dialogue.speaker: Tashigi
dialogue.text: But we have advanced forwards nonethe- less!

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta citizen
dialogue.text: No matter whom it is you fought,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The fight has begun and now ended!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: No man can simply forget the past!

summary: The Straw Hats move toward departure while Marines, allies, and the kingdom deal with the consequences of the battle.
